subject: Re: St. Louis 2006 Arnage RL

can we get samples of colors,,, have them send a

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

From: "Tom Schultz" tom@bentleystl.com
To: lvjet@aol.com
Subject: Arnage RL
Date: Thu, 9 Mar 2006 10:58:37 -0600

Larry,

Please find below the build specs for the incoming
Arnage RL. The motorcar has an eta of June 6. I
calculate the MSRP to be $267495.00 plus deviating
stitching to black. I have not found the price of
this option. I think it may ad $3000 or so to the
MSRP (probubly less). As you know these cars are
very few and far between. We have had other dealers
wanting to trade our dealership for this rare car.
If you like the vehicle well enough to own it I
would suggest we get a buyers order written and
signed and a $10000 deposit to secure the vehicle
for you.

Let me know if you have any further questions about
the Arnage RL.

I'll look forward to your response.

Tom Schultz
Cell 636-734-6583
